auth.label: Bearer Token
auth.description: Energy Performance Certificates bearer token used with the Authorization header. Sign in and copy it from your GOV.UK EPC data account page: https://get-energy-performance-data.communities.gov.uk/api/my-account.

actions.name: get_certificate
actions.description: Get full details for one Energy Performance Certificate or Display Energy Certificate by certificate number.

certificateNumber.description: The Energy Performance Certificate or Display Energy Certificate number.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving one EPC certificate.

certificate.description: An Energy Performance Certificate row returned by the API.

raw.description: The raw Energy Performance Certificates API response.

actions.name: search_display_certificates
actions.description: Search display Energy Performance Certificates for public buildings with supported query filters.

anyOf.description: Unique Property Reference Number to search for.
Unique Property Reference Number to search for.

uprn.description: Unique Property Reference Number to search for.

councils.description: Council names or codes to filter by.

items.description: A parliamentary constituency name or code.

constituencies.description: Parliamentary constituency names or codes to filter by.

energyRatings.description: Energy efficiency ratings to filter by.

dateStart.description: Start date of the certificate registration date range.

dateEnd.description: End date of the certificate registration date range.

pageSize.description: Maximum number of certificate rows to return per page.

currentPage.description: Page number to fetch when retrieving paginated results.

inputSchema.description: Input for searching Energy Performance Certificate rows.

items.description: An Energy Performance Certificate row returned by the API.

rows.description: Certificate rows returned by the API.

anyOf.description: Pagination metadata returned by the API.

raw.description: The raw Energy Performance Certificates API response.

outputSchema.description: Rows returned by an EPC search endpoint.
